hypothesis: E-33: Main-line ceiling test. DIoU + MV3-Small + T=5 + 224 + 50ep. Goal: determine if 30ep→50ep yields meaningful gains, or if the lightweight config has plateaued. E-31 reached 0.3111 at 30ep (bs=16/nw=2). If 50ep > 0.318, extend training is worthwhile. If 50ep ≈ 0.311-0.314, we are at the ceiling for this architecture and should pivot to scheduler or backbone improvements.
head: current_direct_bbox
